one_line_thesis: Coca-Cola Company (The) — thesis pending Marvin deep dive.

decision.next_action: Gather the listed primary evidence and compile the first proof-complete component model; never substitute an analyst plug.

scenario_contract.rule: Build causal low/base/high scenarios before drawing a conclusion.

optionality.rule: Optionality remains unvalued until the component map is complete.

committee.next_action: Complete the component model before freezing an IC evidence packet.

gaps.question: A complete primary-sourced component valuation has not been built.
gaps.evidence_required: normalized owner earnings; incremental return on capital; reinvestment runway; diluted share count; competitive-advantage mechanism
gaps.acceptance_test: Every material economic claim is valued exactly once with causal low/base/high assumptions and primary evidence.
gaps.valuation_effect: Blocks decision-grade value and committee voting.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
routing_reasons: No decisive classification was supplied; owner-earnings is the conservative operating default.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: No calibration before a completed IC decision and measured dividend-aware outcome.

attribution.explanation: Attribution begins after the first decision-grade baseline.

valuation_decision.next_action: Gather the listed primary evidence and compile the first proof-complete component model; never substitute an analyst plug.

insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change confidence in management alignment, oversight, or execution.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Check transaction context, trading plans, and whether the pattern is unusual for this issuer.

insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (cfo, revenues) are accelerating together — growth moved from +230.0% to +138.8% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to -74.3% to +138.8% YoY (baseline median +2.3% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.
